ff132/0.1.0.description:
Initial public release of FF13-2 apworld!

Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF
The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks

To receive items from the client, hold L2 or R2 while in a field area (not the crux/battle)
ff132/0.1.0.title: FF13-2 AP release 0.1.0

ff132/0.1.1.description:
Fixes:
Correct issue when generating a room with multiple FF13-2 players contained within.

Other:
Improve/fill out setup guide

Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF
The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks
ff132/0.1.1.title: FF13-2 AP release 0.1.1

ff132/0.1.2.description:
No functional changes in this release.
- Adjust default option for DLC locations and items to be disabled to prevent issues with accidental use without the DLC Restoration mod
- Add new "/debug" command to client to help in diagnosis of issues with item granting.

Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF
The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks
ff132/0.1.2.title: FF13-2 AP release 0.1.2

ff132/0.1.3.description:
Fix generation when DLC locations are disabled

Widen debug logging when enabled
ff132/0.1.3.title: FF13-2 AP release 0.1.3
